name: Visibilia Editore S.p.a.
summary: Visibilia Editore S.p.a. edits, publishes, and distributes furniture, hi-tech, and cinema related brochures, journals, and periodicals in Italy. The company also provides technical and editorial assistance and consultancy services. In addition, it collects and manages advertising in periodicals by printed paper, as well as in digital formats through customized solutions using the Google AdWords platform. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Milan, Italy. Visibilia Editore S.p.a. is a subsidiary of Visibilia S.r.l.
